name: The Door of Destiny
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>運</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>命</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>めい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>扉</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とびら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: Negate the attack, then Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Fiend/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) During your Standby Phase, while this card is treated as a monster: You can banish any number of "Utopia" monsters with different names from your GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each of those banished monsters, and if you do, this card gains ATK equal to the damage they took.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares a direct attack: Negate the attack, then Special Summon this card as an Effect Monster (Fiend/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). (This card is also still a Trap Card.) During your Standby Phase, while this card is treated as a monster: You can banish any number of "Utopia" monsters with different names from your GY; inflict 500 damage to your opponent for each of those banished monsters, and if you do, this card gains ATK equal to the damage they took.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
